about.line1: Founded by artist Jakub Kanna, the project studio merges technology with imagination.
about.line2: We create work that embraces conceptual freedom and responds to the evolving language of contemporary design.
about.line3Suffix: to bring your idea to life. 🌸
about.introSuffix: merges technology with imagination. We create work that embraces conceptual freedom and responds to the evolving language of contemporary design.
about.section2Desc: Programming and design services focused on brand identity and product impact: mobile apps, websites, creative coding experiences, logo design, brand strategy, and concept development.
about.section3Desc: Industrial design workflows include CNC and 3D print designs.

tagline: STUDIO JAKUB KANNA - Apps and Websites for Artists
hero: Designing and developing unique digital experiences since 2018.
metaDescription: Creative studio founded by Jakub Kanna. Specializing in design for contemporary art and technology. Since 2018.
